text: Standing at the threshold of this glass-walled room, I sense anticipation. The clean geometry and sterile light impart an atmosphere of order and purpose. Inside, the display promises creativity and knowledge—R + D, research and development—a celebration of human curiosity. I feel a quiet thrill at the potential for new ideas, coupled with a certain humility in the face of collective intellect. The museum-like calm invites reflection, as if each step I take will bring me closer to understanding how we, as humans, continually reshape our world.
